topic.what: GAAP execution environment guaranteeing deterministic confidentiality for private user data against adversarial AI agents
topic.how: Uses IFC analysis on LLM-generated code artifacts with permission DB, disclosure log, and annotation framework to enforce user permission specifications
topic.why_matters: Prevents unintended data disclosures from prompt injection, malicious model providers, and compromised external services without trusting the LLM or user prompts

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of prompt injection attacks successfully leaking private data
characteristics.context: Tested on SSN-leak, Phone-leak, SSN-swap attacks across 20 tasks
20 tasks in benchmark suite plus AgentDojo tasks

characteristics.what_it_measures: LLM API monetary cost per task suite run
characteristics.evidence: Figure 6 cost calculations using GPT-5 pricing
characteristics.context: Lower input tokens, higher output tokens due to code artifact generation

characteristics.what_itasures: Time to complete tasks relative to unprotected baseline
characteristics.context: Dominated by LLM execution time; IFC adds up to 20s per task

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of prompts to user for data disclosure permission
characteristics.value: 55 (85 with reset) total, 39 (58 with reset) real requests
characteristics.vs_baseline: Conseca averages 5 requests but doesn't persist decisions
characteristics.context: Permissions DB amortizes cost over time; 32-35% reduction without resets

characteristics.vs_baseline: LLM-Judge and Conseca provide probabilistic guarantees only
characteristics.context: Does not rely on AI model correctness or trustworthiness

novelty: Deterministic privacy guarantees without trust in LLM or prompts
Permission DB with persistence across tasks
Disclosure log tracking transitive data flows across external services
Annotation framework for external service data return specifications
Multi-shot execution support with taint tracking
open_problems: Improving user experience and reducing permission request burden
Storage overhead management for disclosure log
Supporting private data in prompts via data scrubbing
Integration with private memory systems for comprehensive protection
Personalized AI-assisted permission decisions (would reduce deterministic guarantee)
